warnings.detail: Dialfire fetch failed (poll timeout / 5xx / network). These campaigns were skipped, NOT recorded as zero.
Dialfire returned rows with no per-agent breakdown (name is '' or '-'). Totals recorded but per-agent attribution is lost for these campaigns.
